products.name: Mini Steering Wheel
products.subtitle: For Xbox & Scuf Thumbsticks
products.description: Snap-on mini steering wheel for Xbox Series X/S, Xbox One, and Scuf controller thumbsticks. Precision friction fit, 3D printed in black PLA. 45mm diameter — compact enough to not block adjacent buttons.

specs.Compatibility: Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, Scuf

products.name: Webcam Privacy Covers
products.subtitle: 5-Pack
products.description: Simple sliding webcam privacy covers. Snaps onto most laptop screens and monitor bezels. Sold in 5-packs — one for every device. 3D printed in black PLA.

products.name: Cable Clips
products.subtitle: 50-Pack, Mixed Diameters
products.description: Parametric snap-on cable clips with 3M adhesive backing. Mixed pack covers USB cables, power leads, ethernet, and sim rig profile wiring. Print 50 at a time — variety pack covers every cable on your desk.

products.name: Custom Nameplate
products.subtitle: Gamer Tag / Desk Badge
products.description: Personalised 3D printed nameplate. Choose your text and font — we print it in black PLA with raised lettering that catches the light. Currently black only — 2-tone coming when more filament colours arrive.

products.name: Headphone Hook
products.subtitle: Under-Desk, Clamp or Screw Mount
products.description: Keep your headphones off the desk. Two variants: clamp-on (no drilling, M6 bolt included) for desks up to 40mm thick, or screw-mount for a permanent clean install. 3D printed in black PLA, 30% infill for strength.
